name: bet-analyzer
description: Analyse les cotes de paris en temps réel via Flashscore

scripts.build: vite build && vite build --config vite.content.config.js && vite build --config vite.background.config.js
scripts.dev: concurrently "vite build --watch" "vite build --watch --config vite.content.config.js" "vite build --watch --config vite.background.config.js"
